data.name: "Fire-and-forget" support for long-running tasks (like emails or AI), featuring a GUI for queue management, parallel processing, and cancellation.
data.value: "Fire-and-forget" support for long-running tasks (like emails or AI), featuring a GUI for queue management, parallel processing, and cancellation.

data.name: A built-in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system for fine-grained permission management.
data.value: A built-in Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) system for fine-grained permission management.

data.name: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management right out of the box.
data.value: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management, ready to use straight out of the box.

data.name: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management.
data.value: A complete solution for user authentication and profile management.

data.name: A fully responsive layout that looks great on both desktop and mobile devices.
data.value: A fully responsive layout that looks great on both desktop and mobile devices.

data.name: A modern, feature-rich, and highly extensible foundation for your next web application.
data.value: A modern, feature-rich, and highly extensible foundation for your next web application.

data.name: Add free-form notes to any event record for additional context that doesn't fit neatly into structured fields.
data.value: Add free-form notes to any event record for additional context that doesn't fit neatly into structured fields.

data.name: Add the data fields that matter for this event — Distance, Duration, Medication Name, Dosage — choosing the field type and whether each is required.
data.value: Add the data fields that matter for this event — Distance, Duration, Medication Name, Dosage — choosing the field type and whether each is required.

data.name: Administrators can manage global settings through the dashboard, with environment variable overrides for production deployments.
data.value: Administrators can manage global settings through the dashboard, with environment variable overrides for production deployments.

data.name: Aiursoft Template is our definitive choice for enterprise projects! It's built for developers and is lightweight yet powerful. We can skip all the boilerplate for authentication and user management.
data.value: Aiursoft Template is our definitive choice for enterprise projects! It's built for developers and is lightweight yet powerful. We can skip all the boilerplate for authentication and user management.

data.name: All dependencies are automatically registered and always available via constructor injection.
data.value: All dependencies are automatically registered and always available via constructor injection.

data.name: An Event Type is a template for a category of events you want to track. For example, 'Morning Run' or 'Medicine Intake'. Each Event Type can have custom fields so you always capture exactly the data you need.
data.value: An Event Type is a template for a category of events you want to track. For example, 'Morning Run' or 'Medicine Intake'. Each Event Type can have custom fields so you always capture exactly the data you need.

data.name: Attach custom fields of various types to each event type — text, numbers, booleans, and more — with configurable order and required constraints.
data.value: Attach custom fields of various types to each event type — text, numbers, booleans, and more — with configurable order and required constraints.

data.name: Automatic, AI-driven translation into 28 languages for global reach.
data.value: Automatic, AI-driven translation into 28 languages for global reach.

data.name: Automatically deploy to Docker Swarm or Kubernetes clusters.
data.value: Automatically deploy to Docker Swarm or Kubernetes clusters.

data.name: Automatically sync OpenID roles. Unified Rule management.
data.value: Automatically sync OpenID roles. Unified rule management.

data.name: Browse, search, and filter your event history to spot patterns, review past activity, and gain insights from your long-term data.
data.value: Browse, search, and filter your event history to spot patterns, review past activity, and gain insights from your long-term data.

data.name: Build once, run anywhere. Fully containerized architecture.
data.value: Build once, run anywhere. Fully containerised architecture.

data.name: Built for engineers who care about quality.
data.value: Built for engineers who care about quality.

data.name: Built with enterprise-grade yet easy-to-learn native C#.
data.value: Built with enterprise-grade yet easy-to-learn native C#.

data.name: Can multiple users share the same instance?
data.value: Can multiple users share the same instance?

data.name: Choose from SQLite, MySQL, or SQL Server depending on your scale. Easily swap providers with minimal configuration.
data.value: Choose from SQLite, MySQL, or SQL Server depending on your scale. Easily swap providers with minimal configuration.

data.name: Comes with Docker support for simplified and consistent deployments.
data.value: Comes with Docker support for simplified and consistent deployments.

data.name: Comes with full Docker support for simplified, consistent, and reliable deployments.
data.value: Comes with full Docker support for streamlined, consistent, and reliable deployments.

data.name: Comes with strict unit tests, making test-driven development easy.
data.value: Comes with strict unit tests, making test-driven development easy.

data.name: Comprehensive usage tutorials in both English and Chinese.
data.value: Comprehensive usage tutorials in both English and Chinese.

data.name: Create a named event type such as 'Morning Run', 'Medicine Intake', or 'Work Session'. Add a description so everyone knows what it tracks.
data.value: Create a named event type such as 'Morning Run', 'Medicine Intake', or 'Work Session'. Add a description so everyone knows what it tracks.

data.name: Deep integration testing with Authentik. Compatible with Okta.
data.value: Deep integration testing with Authentik. Compatible with Okta.

data.name: Default SQLite database, no configuration needed.
data.value: Default SQLite database, no configuration needed.

data.name: Define your own event types with custom fields, then log every occurrence with structured data. Understand your habits, activities, and history at a glance.
data.value: Define your own event types with custom fields, then log every occurrence with structured data. Understand your habits, activities, and history at a glance.

data.name: Define your own event types with names and descriptions tailored to your specific tracking needs.
data.value: Define your own event types with names and descriptions tailored to your specific tracking needs.

data.name: Designed for everyone, from beginners to experts.
data.value: Designed for everyone, from beginners to experts.

data.name: Designed for the container era. Includes pre-configured CI/CD pipelines for GitLab. Push code, pass strictly linting, auto-test, and deploy to Docker Swarm or Kubernetes automatically.
data.value: Designed for the container era. Includes pre-configured CI/CD pipelines for GitLab. Push code, pass strictly linting, auto-test, and deploy to Docker Swarm or Kubernetes automatically.

data.name: Develop exclusively in UTC while the system automatically converts and displays dates in the user's local time zone.
data.value: Develop exclusively in UTC while the system automatically converts and displays dates in the user's local time zone.

data.name: Each time the event happens, create a record. Fill in the field values, optionally add notes, and the timestamp is captured automatically.
data.value: Each time the event occurs, create a record. Fill in the field values, optionally add notes, and the timestamp is captured automatically.

data.name: Each user manages their own isolated event types and records. Built-in RBAC ensures administrators can oversee all activity.
data.value: Each user manages their own isolated event types and records. Built-in RBAC ensures administrators can oversee all activity.

data.name: Easily switch between database providers, including SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.
data.value: Easily switch between database providers, including SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.

data.name: Easily switch between providers like SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.
data.value: Easily switch between providers such as SQLite, MySQL, SQL Server, and an in-memory database for testing.

data.name: Effortlessly write integration tests using in-memory databases, temporary file systems, built-in mocking, and real-world HTTP request simulation.
data.value: Effortlessly write integration tests using in-memory databases, temporary file systems, built-in mocking, and real-world HTTP request simulation.

data.name: EventsRecorder is schema-flexible. If you have a recurring event you want to capture in a structured way, it fits right in.
data.value: EventsRecorder is schema-flexible. If you have a recurring event you want to capture in a structured way, it fits right in.

data.name: EventsRecorder supports multiple field types including text, numbers, and booleans. Each field can be marked as required and assigned a display order, giving you full control over the data structure.
data.value: EventsRecorder supports multiple field types including text, numbers, and booleans. Each field can be marked as required and assigned a display order, giving you full control over the data structure.

data.name: Every event record is automatically timestamped in UTC so you can accurately reconstruct a history of occurrences over time.
data.value: Every event record is automatically timestamped in UTC so you can accurately reconstruct a history of occurrences over time.

data.name: Everything you need to track structured events.
data.value: Everything you need to track structured events.

data.name: Features a built-in file management system with automatic avatar compression and privacy protection.
data.value: Features a built-in file management system with automatic avatar compression and privacy protection.

data.name: Features a built-in file management system with automatic avatar compression.
data.value: Features a built-in file management system with automatic profile picture compression.

data.name: Fields are validated on both client and server sides, ensuring your data is clean and consistent across all records.
data.value: Fields are validated on both client and server sides, ensuring your data is clean and consistent across all records.

data.name: for any inquiries or to report issues.
data.value: for any enquiries or to report issues.

data.name: From personal health habits to team workflow checkpoints, EventsRecorder adapts to any structured data you want to capture over time.
data.value: From personal health habits to team workflow checkpoints, EventsRecorder adapts to any structured data you wish to capture over time.

data.name: Full stack open source. Completely free software, no paid features. Built entirely on open standards.
data.value: Full stack open source. Completely free software, no paid features. Built entirely on open standards.

data.name: Fully open source. No paid tiers, no vendor lock-in. Your data stays on your infrastructure.
data.value: Fully open source. No paid tiers, no vendor lock-in. Your data stays on your infrastructure.

data.name: Handle recurring jobs like cleanup and synchronization with a comprehensive GUI for monitoring execution history and logs.
data.value: Handle recurring jobs like cleanup and synchronization with a comprehensive GUI for monitoring execution history and logs.

data.name: Hands-on tutorials suitable for computer science interns.
data.value: Hands-on tutorials suitable for computer science interns.

data.name: Here are some of the answers you might be looking for.
data.value: Here are some of the answers you might be looking for.

data.name: Here's what developers from our community have to say.
data.value: Here's what developers from our community have to say.

data.name: How do I deploy my application?
data.value: How do I deploy my application?

data.name: I built Aiursoft Template because I was tired of setting up the same Auth, Log, and CI/CD pipelines for every new enterprise project. This isn't just a template; it's the crystallized best practices from years of high-concurrency production environments. It allows my team to skip the boring setup and jump straight to business logic.
data.value: I built Aiursoft Template because I was tired of setting up the same Auth, Log, and CI/CD pipelines for every new enterprise project. This isn't just a template; it's the crystallized best practices from years of high-concurrency production environments. It allows my team to skip the boring setup and jump straight to business logic.

data.name: Includes extensive documentation and practical examples to get you started quickly.
data.value: Includes extensive documentation and practical examples to get you started quickly.

data.name: Is it free to use Aiursoft Template?
data.value: Is it free to use Aiursoft Template?

data.name: Join our community and start building today!
data.value: Join our community and start building today!

data.name: Join our growing community of developers building the next generation of web applications.
data.value: Join our growing community of developers building the next generation of web applications.

data.name: Log garden watering, bird sightings, photography outings, or any hobby with the exact custom fields your activity demands.
data.value: Log garden watering, bird sightings, photography outings, or any hobby with the exact custom fields your activity demands.

data.name: Log runs, workouts, medicine intake, sleep hours, or blood pressure readings with custom fields for every metric that matters to you.
data.value: Log runs, workouts, medicine intake, sleep hours, or blood pressure readings with custom fields for every metric that matters to you.

data.name: Models are validated on both client and server sides based on data annotations.
data.value: Models are validated on both client and server sides based on data annotations.

data.name: No dependency on any cloud vendor. Run anywhere, any time — your data stays with you.
data.value: No dependency on any cloud vendor. Run anywhere, any time — your data stays with you.

data.name: No dependency on any cloud vendor. Run anywhere, any time.
data.value: No dependency on any cloud vendor. Run anywhere, any time.

data.name: Pre-configured CI/CD pipelines specifically for GitLab.
data.value: Pre-configured CI/CD pipelines specifically for GitLab.

data.name: Record daily reading sessions, language practice, study hours, or any habit you want to build — with progress visible over time.
data.value: Record daily reading sessions, language practice, study hours, or any habit you want to build — with progress visible over time.

data.name: Runs without any internet connection required.
data.value: Runs without any internet connection required.

data.name: Seamlessly integrate with any OpenID Connect provider, with automatic role synchronization.
data.value: Seamlessly integrate with any OpenID Connect provider, with automatic role synchronisation.

data.name: Self-host it, fork it, and adapt it to your needs freely under the MIT License.
data.value: Self-host it, fork it, and adapt it to your needs freely under the MIT License.

data.name: Sign up for free and start defining your event types in minutes.
data.value: Sign up for free and start defining your event types in minutes.

data.name: Smart dark mode that adapts to the user's system settings.
data.value: Smart dark mode that adapts to the user's system settings.

data.name: Smart dark mode that automatically adapts to the user's system settings.
data.value: An intelligent dark mode that automatically adapts to the user's system settings.

data.name: Standard implementation. Switch providers without compilation.
data.value: Standard implementation. Switch providers without compilation.

data.name: Start with a single 'docker run' command.
data.value: Start with a single 'docker run' command.

data.name: Strict linting rules and zero warnings by default.
data.value: Strict linting rules and zero warnings by default.

data.name: Strict linting rules with 0 warnings in the default project.
data.value: Strict linting rules with 0 warnings in the default project.

data.name: Supports both environment variables and database-backed settings, with automatic priority given to environment variables for seamless overrides.
data.value: Supports both environment variables and database-backed settings, with automatic priority given to environment variables for seamless overrides.

data.name: Supports JetBrains Rider for easy code style fixes.
data.value: Supports JetBrains Rider for easy code style fixes.

data.name: The definitive, battle-tested .NET enterprise foundation. From Auth to AI, we've solved the hard parts so you don't have to.
data.value: The definitive, battle-tested .NET enterprise foundation. From Auth to AI, we've solved the hard parts so you don't have to.

data.name: The easiest way is Docker: a single 'docker run' command is all you need. EventsRecorder is fully self-contained and works offline with SQLite by default. You can also install it directly on Ubuntu via the provided install script, or run it locally with the .NET 10 SDK.
data.value: The easiest way is Docker: a single 'docker run' command is all you need. EventsRecorder is fully self-contained and works offline with SQLite by default. You can also install it directly on Ubuntu via the provided install script, or run it locally with the .NET 10 SDK.

data.name: The navigation bar automatically adjusts based on user roles and permissions.
data.value: The navigation bar automatically adjusts based on user roles and permissions.

data.name: The template is built for easy deployment. It includes full Docker support, so you can containerize your app and run it anywhere. You can also deploy it directly to IIS, Azure App Service, or any server that supports ASP.NET Core.
data.value: The template is designed for straightforward deployment. It includes comprehensive Docker support, allowing you to containerise your app and run it anywhere. You can also deploy it directly to IIS, Azure App Service, or any server that supports ASP.NET Core.

data.name: This is a template project, where we start the voyager...
data.value: This is a template project, where we begin the voyage...

data.name: Three simple steps to structured event tracking.
data.value: Three simple steps to structured event tracking.

data.name: Track vehicle maintenance, home repairs, equipment servicing, or any periodic maintenance activity with timestamped records.
data.value: Track vehicle maintenance, home repairs, equipment servicing, or any periodic maintenance activity with timestamped records.

data.name: Track work sessions, meeting outcomes, task completions, or any recurring workplace activity with structured data fields.
data.value: Track work sessions, meeting outcomes, task completions, or any recurring workplace activity with structured data fields.

data.name: Trusted by production-grade applications including AnduinOS, StatHub, and Warp. We don't just share this code; we run our entire business on it.
data.value: Trusted by production-grade applications including AnduinOS, StatHub, and Warp. We don't just share this code; we run our entire business on it.

data.name: Use it as a foundation for your SaaS, a backend for your mobile app, a corporate website, or a personal blog. The possibilities are endless.
data.value: Use it as a foundation for your SaaS, a backend for your mobile app, a corporate website, or a personal blog. The possibilities are endless.

data.name: What can you track with EventsRecorder?
data.value: What can you track with EventsRecorder?

data.name: What do I need to get started?
data.value: What do I need to get started?

data.name: Yes, Aiursoft Template is completely free and open-source under the MIT License. You can use it for personal and commercial projects without any cost.
data.value: Yes, Aiursoft Template is completely free and open-source under the MIT Licence. You can use it for personal and commercial projects without any cost.

data.name: Yes, EventsRecorder is completely free and open-source under the MIT License. You can use it for personal or commercial purposes at no cost and self-host it on your own infrastructure.
data.value: Yes, EventsRecorder is completely free and open-source under the MIT License. You can use it for personal or commercial purposes at no cost and self-host it on your own infrastructure.

data.name: Yes. EventsRecorder supports multiple users on a single instance. Each user has their own private event types and records. Administrators have additional oversight capabilities through the built-in RBAC system.
data.value: Yes. EventsRecorder supports multiple users on a single instance. Each user has their own private event types and records. Administrators have additional oversight capabilities through the built-in RBAC system.

data.name: You can get community support via GitHub Discussions. Please visit our
data.value: You can obtain community support via GitHub Discussions. Please visit our

data.name: You'll need the .NET 10 SDK, npm and your favorite IDE, like Visual Studio or JetBrains Rider. You can find the full setup guide in our documentation.
data.value: You'll need the .NET 10 SDK, npm and your favourite IDE, such as Visual Studio or JetBrains Rider. You can find the full setup guide in our documentation.

data.name: Your enterprise users don't need to register repeatedly.
data.value: Your enterprise users don't need to register repeatedly.
